markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 10th F1TENTH Autonomous Grand Prix

Date | In-Person Competition | Virtual Competition  
---|---|---  
February 4th | Registration opens   
March 14th - 1 pm ET | Orientation 1  
Online, demonstrate expectations, provision of simulation environment, prospective participants can ask questions   
[Meeting Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1F8kW2i-iaECLBFn0SO_8qTWl_3BDUfukOEL28wrZ8Lc/edit?usp=sharing)  
April 18th - 12 pm ET | Registration closes   
Orientation 2   
Online, Introduction of all teams, Race overview, Track release for virtual competition, Track overview for in-person competition [Meeting Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ksdJOyLnmvStYZs96sisFfnDUIYsuLFb8AH3p7o4O88/edit?usp=sharing)  
April 25th |  | Qualifying submission opens (12:00 EDT)  
May 2nd | - | Qualifying submission closes (12:00 EDT)  
May 9th | Video Submission: Demonstrate Driving  | Virtual GP submission opens (12:00 EDT)  
May 16th | - | Virtual GP submission closes (12:00 EDT)  
May 23rd | Team Training on their own   
(No Spervisions) | -  
May 24th | Training and Qualifying | -  
May 25th | Race day (10:00 EDT)   
Award Ceremony | Race day (16:30 EDT)   
Award Ceremony
